# Image Banner

The Image Banner is a streamlined, visually focused banner that displays a full-width image with an optional caption. It prioritizes the image itself over text content, making it well-suited for visual storytelling, photography showcases, or pages where the imagery is the primary message. Available in tall, short, and mini height variations.

## Interactive Preview

Use the controls panel below to experiment with the component's properties in real-time.

<div className="sb-full-bleed-canvas">
  <Canvas of={ImageBannerStories.ImageBanner} />
</div>

## Properties

### Optional Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'optional')}

## Theme Options

The Image Banner supports the full set of component theme dials:

- **Default**: Standard theme using global color settings
- **One through Five**: Custom theme dials that override global settings with component-specific colors

Use the `image_banner__content__background` property to apply different themes.

## Size Variations

The Image Banner is available in three heights. Use the interactive preview above to switch between them, or see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-banners-image-banner-visreg--visreg) for a side-by-side comparison.

### Short

A reduced height variant — useful when you need a visual accent without the full-bleed impact of the tall version.

<div className="sb-full-bleed-canvas">
  <Canvas of={ImageBannerStories.ImageBannerShort} />
</div>

### Mini

The most compact height variant, matching the Grand Hero Banner mini option. Use it when you need a small image accent rather than a full-sized banner.

<div className="sb-full-bleed-canvas">
  <Canvas of={ImageBannerStories.ImageBannerMini} />
</div>

## Technical Specifications

- **Atomic Level**: Molecule
- **Template**: `image/yds-image-banner.twig`
- **Styles**: `image/yds-image-banner.scss`

### Accessibility

- Background images implemented with appropriate alternative text handling
- Caption text is visible and properly associated with the image
- Content remains accessible when background images fail to load

### Behavior

- **Responsive Design**: Banner scales appropriately across viewport sizes
- **Image Loading**: Uses responsive images with appropriate srcset for different screen sizes
- **Video Background**: When enabled, replaces the static image with a video

## Usage Guidelines

### Best Practices

- Use when the image is the primary content and text is secondary or absent
- Choose tall for maximum visual impact on key landing pages
- Choose short for a more compact visual accent
- Use high-quality, full-bleed images with a 16:9 aspect ratio
- Include a caption when the image source or subject matter warrants attribution

### Things to Avoid

- Don't use when you need prominent calls-to-action — use Action Banner instead
- Don't rely solely on the image to convey critical information
- Avoid images with complex compositions that lose meaning at reduced sizes

## Testing

For comprehensive visual regression testing with all size and theme variations, see the [Visreg page](?path=/story/molecules-banners-image-banner-visreg--visreg).

## Related Components

- **Action Banner**: When you need text content and calls-to-action alongside the image
- **Grand Hero Banner**: For maximum-impact hero with content overlay
- **Video Banner**: For video-first content without a static image fallback
